phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach the top of the oratory
phrases.text_local: Comment est-ce qu'on monte jusqu'en haut de l'oratoire ?
phrases.pronunciation: ko-MAH ess-KON MONNT zhoos-kohn OH duh lo-rah-TWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: Pilgrims traditionally climb the 283 steps on their knees as an act of devotion. An escalator and shuttle bus are available for others.

responses.english: Take the stairs or the elevator on the left.
responses.phonetic: pruh-NAY less-kah-LYAY oo lah-sahn-SUR ah GOHSH
responses.local: Prenez l'escalier ou l'ascenseur à gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the oratory closes today
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ferme l'oratoire aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UR FERM lor-ah-TWAHR oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: Saint Joseph's Oratory has varying hours depending on the season. The gardens and upper basilica may close earlier than the main chapel.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if mass is celebrated today
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a une messe célébrée aujourd'hui ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess-KEEL ee ah OON mess say-lay-BRAY oh-zhoor-DWEE
phrases.cultural_note: The oratory celebrates masses daily in the Crypt Church and the Basilica. Visitors are welcome to attend regardless of faith.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the votive candles are
phrases.text_local: Où est-ce qu'on peut allumer un lampion ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo ess-KON puh ah-loo-MAY un lahm-pee-YON
phrases.cultural_note: Votive candles (lampions) can be lit in the Crypt Church. The room of crutches left by those healed is a striking and moving display.

responses.phonetic: dahn lah shah-PEL voh-TEEV ahn BAH
responses.local: Dans la chapelle votive, en bas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the gift shop and café
phrases.text_local: La boutique et le café, c'est à quel étage ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah boo-TEEK ay luh kah-FAY say ah kel ay-TAHZH
phrases.cultural_note: The oratory complex has multiple levels. The café serves light meals and the gift shop carries religious items and local produce.

responses.english: Past the shop, on the right.
